query:
SELECT uo.*, u.name, u.openId 
FROM user_onboarding uo 
JOIN users u ON uo.userId = u.id 
WHERE u.openId = 'arfeen-khan-open-id';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ve2VbkP4iEu522.root --database jQsGzEaS9E2xgaK8jEKUPB --execute SELECT uo.*, u.name, u.openId 
FROM user_onboarding uo 
JOIN users u ON uo.userId = u.id 
WHERE u.openId = 'arfeen-khan-open-id';
